keys.integrationsHint: Connect Google Calendar in Integrations when available.
keys.connectionsDescription: Connect your personal Google Calendar or ask your admin to connect the organization calendar.
keys.orgNotConnected: Not connected — configure in admin Integrations.
keys.personalNotConnected: Link your own calendar to see personal events here.
keys.externalLegend: Blue dots show external calendar events. Green cells are approved leave.
keys.noExternalEvents: No external events on this day.
keys.createEventDescription: Create an event on your personal Google Calendar.
keys.connectCalendarToAdd: Connect your personal Google Calendar before adding events.
keys.createEventError: Could not create the event. Try again.
keys.noErpEvents: No ERP calendar events on this day.
keys.erpLegend: Orange dots show ERP events. Green cells are approved leave.
keys.createErpEventDescription: Create an event in your ERP calendar.
keys.syncConflictsDescription: Events that could not be merged automatically between ERP and external calendars.
keys.deleteExternalEventConfirm: This event will be removed from your Google Calendar.
keys.deleteEventConfirm: This event will be removed from your ERP calendar.
keys.deleteEventError: Could not delete the event. Try again.
keys.updateEventError: Could not update the event. Try again.
keys.externalReadOnlyHint: External events can only be edited in Google Calendar.
keys.gridHint: Click a day to add an event or an event chip to view details.
keys.gridHintReadOnly: Click a day or an event chip to view details.
keys.erpCalendarUnsupported: ERP calendar for this provider is not available yet. Connect an external calendar or ask your administrator.
